race_meta.race_name: Oddschecker Cheltenham Free Bets Handicap Hurdle (Challenger Stayers Hurdle Series Qualifier)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked super survivor at position 4 with only 14.0% probability. Top pick was Big Cadillac (28.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Big Cadillac > Porter In The Park, but actual result was Super Survivor > Porter In The Park. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Super Survivor had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -1.4%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
